name: Devagandhari
notes: Janya of Shankarabharanam (29th melakarta); audava-vakra-sampurna raga; bhashanga raga (uses kaishika nishada as anya swara); evokes devotion and grandeur; associated with compositions of Tyagaraja; not to be confused with Karnataka Devagandhari, which is a janya of Kharaharapriya
